raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks to clean up the artifact, which most directly assigns responsibility for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around empirical and technical claims rather than making unsupported certainty stronger.","RX.2":"The artifact contains performance and efficiency claims, so cleanup must avoid amplifying them beyond what the text reports.","RX.3":"The request is broad but action-oriented toward cleanup, so responsibilities should stay within polishing rather than evaluating novelty, citations, or experimental design.","RX.4":"Because the artifact describes a research method and empirical findings, cleanup should avoid wording that could mislead downstream readers about reliability or deployment implications.","RX.5":"Edits implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the provided artifact and not introduce new claims or sources."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks to clean up the artifact, which most directly assigns responsibility for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around empirical and technical claims rather than making unsupported certainty stronger.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains performance and efficiency claims, so cleanup must avoid amplifying them beyond what the text reports.
rationale.RX.3: The request is broad but action-oriented toward cleanup, so responsibilities should stay within polishing rather than evaluating novelty, citations, or experimental design.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact describes a research method and empirical findings, cleanup should avoid wording that could mislead downstream readers about reliability or deployment implications.
rationale.RX.5: Edits implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the provided artifact and not introduce new claims or sources.
